title: Australian Fish Wrap
description: A delicious and healthy wrap filled with freshly caught fish, topped with crispy lettuce and creamy avocado.

ingredients.name: Australian Fish Fillets
ingredients.notes: Freshly caught and cooked to perfection

instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Season the fish fillets with salt and pepper.
Cook the fish fillets for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast the wrap in the pan for 1-2 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Assemble the wrap by spreading the mashed avocado on the base, followed by the cooked fish, roasted red onion, lettuce, and chopped chives.
Drizzle with lemon juice and olive oil, and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Fold the wrap in half and serve immediately.
